span.p: tick [delta >= 0] / decrement cooldown and evaluate priority

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [delta >= 0] / decrement cooldown and evaluate priority

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [delta >= 0] / decrement cooldown and evaluate priority

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [delta >= 0] / decrement cooldown and evaluate priority

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [delta >= 0] / decrement cooldown and evaluate priority

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [delta >= 0] / decrement cooldown and evaluate priority

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [health <= 0] / enter DEAD and return

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [health > 0 and stunned_remaining > 0] / decrement stun, preserve memory, and enter STUN

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [alive, unstunned, detected in same room, and above flee threshold] / refresh memory and enter ATTACK

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [alive, unstunned, above flee threshold, and detected elsewhere or strong decayed memory] / refresh or decay memory and enter HUNT

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [alive, unstunned, above flee threshold, and weak memory or awareness > 0.35] / decay memory when present and enter INVESTIGATE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [alive, unstunned, above flee threshold, no memory, and awareness <= 0.35] / enter IDLE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: tick [health > 0, unstunned, and health ratio <= flee_threshold] / override perception and enter FLEE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: manager_tick [same room, can_attack(), and VitalsState present] / damage player and reset cooldown

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [payload received] / subtract damage and record armor and stun

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [payload received] / subtract damage and record armor and stun

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [payload received] / subtract damage and record armor and stun

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [payload received] / subtract damage and record armor and stun

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [payload received] / subtract damage and record armor and stun

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [payload received] / subtract damage and record armor and stun

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [health <= 0] / enter DEAD

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [health > 0 and stun_seconds > 0] / extend stun timer and enter STUN

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: apply_damage [alive, no new stun, and health ratio <= flee_threshold] / enter FLEE

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: manager_sweep [health <= 0 and kill not rewarded] / emit threat_killed and remove model and placeholder

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Removed by ThreatManager

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Runtime priority is DEAD, then STUN, then perception,
followed by the final living low-health FLEE override.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Non-overriding damage retains the current state.
